name: core
description: Core infrastructure for AgentTeamLand teams — memory, journal, wiki, version-check, learning-capture, docs-sync, team-repo-maintenance, karpathy-guidelines, schemas

skills.name: save-learnings
skills.description: Save end-of-conversation learnings to project memory, wiki (mandatory), team repo, and journal; prepares doc drafts for doc-impact markers

skills.name: create-code-diagram
skills.description: Generate full project Mermaid class diagram

skills.name: wiki
skills.description: Living project knowledge base (init, ingest, query, lint)

rules.name: agent-structure
rules.description: Children pattern + Knowledge Base + Blueprint pattern for agents

rules.name: version-check
rules.description: Auto-pull agentteamland repos on every prompt

rules.name: karpathy-guidelines
rules.description: Four coding principles (Think Before Coding, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven Execution) — reduce LLM coding mistakes

rules.name: learning-capture
rules.description: Inline <!-- learning --> marker protocol: drop markers when learning moments occur; session-end hook (atl learning-capture) scans and processes them

rules.name: docs-sync
rules.description: Proactive docs sync: when user-facing behavior changes, update README / doc site in the same turn (or mark doc-impact for session-end backstop)

rules.name: team-repo-maintenance
rules.description: Governance for shared team/global repo changes: save-learnings + semver bump + conventional commit + Discovered-via + PR flow (branch-protection enforced); plus team.json format conventions

rules.name: branch-hygiene
rules.description: Three checkpoints to counter drift: verify main + clean before tasks in shared repos; checkout main + pull right after PR merge; run local validator before pushing constrained files.
